ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the meeting occurs (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "meeting_name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the locations table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the regions table */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the meeting organizers */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the meeting organizers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the meeting */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the meeting is online or in-person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was added to the directory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the meeting details */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the meeting_organizers table */,
  "types" TEXT /* Types of meeting (e.g., Living Sober, Open, Wheelchair Access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES meeting_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the location */,
  "accessibility_features" TEXT /* Accessibility features of the location (e.g., wheelchair access, hearing loop) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was added to the directory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the meeting type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the meeting type details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meeting organizer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the organizer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the organizer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organizer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the organizer details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_organizers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the meetings table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_reviews_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
